name: My Mushroom Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop onions.
2. Wash and chop mushrooms.
3. In a medium pan, heat oil and butter over medium heat. Add chopped onions and mushrooms. Cook for 5 minutes until softened.
4. Add flour and stir well to combine with the onion and mushroom mixture.
5. Gradually add chicken stock and bring to a simmer.
6. Stir in nutmeg, salt, and pepper. Simmer for an additional 8-10 minutes.
7. Stir in heavy cream. Continue to simmer until heated through but not boiling.
8. Add chopped broccoli and cook for another minute or two until just tender.
9. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
